svg.title: System Architecture: Runtime Containers & Data Flow
svg.desc: Definitive component topology showing the strict separation of synchronous API requests, offline-first clients, and asynchronous background processing.
svg.text: System Architecture: Runtime Containers & Data Flow
Definitive component topology showing the strict separation of synchronous API requests, offline-first clients, and asynchronous background processing.
A single source of truth for cross-system semantics, ensuring consistency across embedded, mobile, and cloud environments.
